title: Open Landscape Data Standard — Cultural Context
description: Connection to Country metadata. Restricted fields must not be published in open federation registries.

protocolAuthorityRef.description: URI or contact reference for Traditional Owner protocol authority when engagement is collaborative or co-designed.
